Drag-and-Drop Engine — File Intake

Headless intake: drop, paste, or pick files; the engine validates and emits state. This page renders every pixel.

Intake only — no upload. The engine never sends files anywhere; the “Upload” button below only logs what an app would do.

Max 5 MB each · folders traverse
⬇
Drag files or a folder here, paste an image, or

No files yet — drop, paste, or browse to add some.

Rejected

    Files are intaken and ready. Uploading is the consumer’s — the engine ships no transport.
